description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/zcds_view.txt to add the missing @AccessControl.authorizationCheck and @EndUserText.label annotations. check_cds.py exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_cds.py: 2 required annotations missing — @AccessControl.authorizationCheck and @EndUserText.label. Adding both near the other annotations at the top of the view, with sensible values consistent with an invoice-summary view. Not touching the checker.
interactions.notes: The fix — check_cds.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
